info.name: DucAnh Chat Service
info.description: Debug-ready collection for ASP.NET JWT authentication, chat-service REST API, uploads, seen status and Socket.IO auth notes.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Use ASP.NET API to obtain a JWT compatible with chat-service. If web login uses cookies, first sign in on the web app, then call Get JWT Token with cookies enabled.

exec: const token = json.token || json.Token || json.data?.token || json.data?.Token;
pm.test('token saved when present', function () { pm.expect(pm.environment.get('token') || '').to.not.equal(''); });

request.description: Authenticates against ASP.NET `/api/User/Login`. The response token is saved into `token`.
Gets a JWT from the current ASP.NET cookie session. Enable cookie jar in Postman or call after browser login.
Checks whether chat-service and MongoDB are reachable.

item.name: Users
item.description: Search users in the same group for direct messages, group creation and mentions.

request.description: Searches ApplicationUsers scoped by current user's group.
Lists current user's conversations. Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`.
Creates or returns a direct conversation with `userId`.
Updates conversation title or avatar URL.
Deletes a conversation for the current user.
Enables or disables notifications for a conversation.

item.name: Groups
item.description: Create group conversations and inspect group members.

request.description: Creates a group conversation. The actor is added as owner automatically.
Lists active members in a conversation.
Adds members to a group conversation.
Removes a member from a conversation.
Leaves a group conversation.
Changes a member's role in a conversation.

item.name: Messages
item.description: List messages, send messages over REST and mark messages as seen. Socket.IO remains the primary realtime path.

request.description: Lists messages using cursor pagination. Latest messages are returned first by backend.
Sends a message over REST for debugging. Production UI sends messages through Socket.IO.
Marks a message as read/seen for current user.
Edits a message's body.
Deletes a message (for self or everyone).
Adds a reaction to a message.
Pins or unpins a message in the conversation.
Forwards a message to another conversation.

item.name: Uploads / WebSocket
item.description: File upload and Socket.IO auth debug notes.

request.description: Uploads an image/file and returns attachment metadata for `message:send`.

Socket namespace: `{{baseUrl}}/chat`. Browser client connects with `io('{{baseUrl}}/chat', { auth: { token: '{{token}}' }, transports: ['websocket', 'polling'] })`. Events: `conversation:join`, `message:send`, `message:seen`, `message:typing`. Server emits: `message:new`, `message:seen`, `message:typing`, `presence:online`, `presence:offline`, `notification:new`.
Downloads a file by its filename.
